headline: Friday is your make-or-break moment—choose discipline.
summary: You're 0.67 kg/week behind pace; today's food choices and movement directly reset your trajectory toward 88 kg by June 2027.
details: Replace emotional snacking with Huel meals and water—this is your Friday shield against weekend sabotage. Commit to 30 minutes on the rowing machine today to burn stress and build momentum. Today matters because one perfect Friday breaks your cycle and proves you can choose your goal over cravings; repeat this next Friday and you reset your pace.
